caption: A man with glasses and a dark shirt sits in a room with equipment in the background, including a "TRANSCENDENT" sign. He is positioned to the right of a computer screen showing a "RANDOM.ORG" website titled "True Random Number Service" and "List Randomizer." In the initial sequence, the text input box under "Part 1: Enter List Items" is empty. As time progresses, the man interacts with the computer, and a list of sports card items is populated into the box, starting with "[01] Original Art Sketch Card by James Florentino # d 1 of 1". Other entries include a "2018 Topps Chrome" card and a "RANDOM JONYMAN 1/1 AUTO". The website also displays buttons for "Randomize", "Reset Form", and "Switch to Advanced Mode". A red "Subscribe" button and text urging viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" are overlaid on the bottom right of the screen.
